description:
## What

REST API routes for the library registry, enabling the UI (M3) to manage libraries.

## Deliverables

1. **route.ts** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries — GET (list all) and POST (add library)
2. **route.ts** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries/[id] — GET (single), PATCH (update), DELETE (remove)
3. **resolve route** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries/[id]/resolve — POST triggers CEM resolution via wc-tools resolve_cdn_cem for CDN/npm libraries. Updates componentCount and lastScored on the registry entry.
4. **score route** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries/[id]/score — POST triggers health scoring. For local: runs admin 17-dim scorer. For CDN: calls wc-tools score_all_components with cached CEM path.

## Acceptance Criteria

- All routes return proper JSON responses with correct status codes
- POST validates required fields per source type
- DELETE returns 400 if trying to delete the default library
- Resolve endpoint gracefully returns error if wc-tools binary not found
- Score endpoint returns scoring tier indicator (full vs cem-only)
- TypeScript compiles with zero errors
title: M2: Library Registry REST API Routes

## What

REST API routes for the library registry, enabling the UI (M3) to manage libraries.

## Deliverables

1. **route.ts** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries — GET (list all) and POST (add library)
2. **route.ts** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries/[id] — GET (single), PATCH (update), DELETE (remove)
3. **resolve route** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries/[id]/resolve — POST triggers CEM resolution via wc-tools resolve_cdn_cem for CDN/npm libraries. Updates componentCount and lastScored on the registry entry.
4. **score route** at apps/admin/src/app/api/libraries/[id]/score — POST triggers health scoring. For local: runs admin 17-dim scorer. For CDN: calls wc-tools score_all_components with cached CEM path.

## Acceptance Criteria

- All routes return proper JSON responses with correct status codes
- POST validates required fields per source type
- DELETE returns 400 if trying to delete the default library
- Resolve endpoint gracefully returns error if wc-tools binary not found
- Score endpoint returns scoring tier indicator (full vs cem-only)
- TypeScript compiles with zero errors
